49.reason: Error: When x equals base->num, the code breaks without inserting the node. According to the problem, values greater than or equal to the root go to the right child, so equal values should be inserted into the right subtree, not ignored.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  This line incorrectly ignores duplicate values.
